parameters: Dear All Robots Who Wish To See Me:
Acess To The Master Fortress Has Been Prohibited For My Own
But If You Want To Know, The Gates Will Be Unlocked Via
Beating All Of The Robo Comanders In The \C[3]Various Bases Set
Around Ralham.\C[0] Example For The Nitwits Among Us:
There Is A Comander In The Prison. But You May Not Be Able
To Get There Because The Road Is "Blocked Off".
If you would like to assist our newest Robo Comander,
please take the road past here, and keep going.\! But you
But Otherwise Contact Me Via Email. My Email Is Programmed
Oh...\! what happened to that grandiose attitude?\!
Now, give up!\! Tell us how to get to the boss...\!
And we might decide to spare you and let you go.
Isn't it our job to beat these guys?
I'm not going to tell you anything!

We still haven't checked back yet.
Theres no going back from this...
You where handed a \C[17]Piece Of Paper\C[0]
Lets keep finding keys so we can get up there.
